themes.reasoning_notes: Activated team-wide pump rewards boards with multiple creatures; functions as a classic go-wide finisher/payoff in white creature decks.
Kor Scout Ally typeline gives minor tribal relevance, but rules text does not specifically reward creature type synergies.
Repeatable team pump rewards having multiple creatures; this is a classic go-wide mana-sink payoff. It has no text-based tribal synergy.
